components.templateData:
Home / Components / Select

Select

A feature-driven combobox for single and multi selection with search, virtualization, async loading, and full keyboard support.

@for (tab of tabs; track tab.label) { {{ tab.label }} }
@switch (currentTab()) { @case ('overview') {

Overview

Enable features declaratively through inputs. Combine searchable, multiple, and virtualScroll as needed without separate component variants.

Selected: {{ selectedFramework() }}

Features

  • Single and multi select with clearable values
  • Local and async search with debounced searchChange events
  • Virtual scroll for 10k+ options via Angular CDK
  • Custom option and empty templates
  • Disabled options, loading, and empty states
  • ARIA combobox with active descendant keyboard navigation

Sizes

} @case ('accessibility') {

Accessibility

Keyboard and ARIA

Select implements the ARIA combobox pattern with listbox popup, active descendant management, and full keyboard support.

Key Action
ArrowDown / ArrowUpNavigate options
Enter / SpaceOpen panel or select active option
EscapeClose panel
TabClose panel and move focus
Home / EndJump to first or last enabled option
TypeaheadJump to matching option by label

Provide ariaLabel when the trigger has no visible label. Focus-visible styles use --pui-color-focus-ring for WCAG AA contrast in light and dark themes.

} @case ('theming') {

Theming

CSS variables

{{ themeCode }}

Component-level override

{{ customThemeCode }}
} @case ('performance') {

Performance

Scalable rendering and worker processing

Premium UI separates computation from rendering. Enable virtualScroll for DOM efficiency and opt into useWorker to delegate heavy search/filter work off the main thread.

What workers handle

  • Text search, fuzzy search, keyword search
  • Filtering, sorting, grouping, ranking
  • Large dataset indexing and transformations

What workers do NOT handle

  • DOM rendering or virtual scroll (stays on main thread)
  • Overlays, focus management, keyboard navigation, animations

Datasets are initialized once inside the worker. Subsequent operations send only query payloads — not the full options array — to minimize serialization cost. 

<pui-select
  [options]="largeDataset"
  searchable
  virtualScroll
  [useWorker]="true"
  placeholder="50k options"
/>
  • Features initialize lazily — search UI renders only when searchable and open
  • OnPush change detection with signal-derived filtered options
  • Debounced worker search with cancellation for stale queries
  • Automatic main-thread fallback when workers are unavailable
  • Fixed itemHeight for predictable virtual scroll measurements
} @case ('playground') {
